ddls:
CREATE TABLE "federal_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each federal state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the federal state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the federal state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the federal state in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the federal state */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases */,
  "cases_per_100k" REAL /* Cases per 100,000 population */,
  "cases_last_7_days" INTEGER /* Number of cases in the last 7 days */,
  "incidence_rate" REAL /* 7-day incidence rate per 100,000 population */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "cases_last_14_days" INTEGER /* Number of cases in the last 14 days */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES federal_states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the federal state */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  "deaths_per_100k" REAL /* Deaths per 100,000 population */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "deaths_last_7_days" INTEGER /* Number of deaths in the last 7 days */,
  "deaths_last_14_days" INTEGER /* Number of deaths in the last 14 days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES federal_states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "first_detected_date" TEXT /* Date when the variant was first detected */,
  "spread_rate" REAL /* Estimated spread rate of the variant */,
  "fatality_rate" REAL /* Estimated fatality rate associated with the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_cases" (
  "variant_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant case */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "number_of_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases for the variant */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_cases_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_cases_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hospital */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of beds available */,
  "icu_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds available */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current number of occupied beds */,
  "current_icu_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current number of occupied ICU beds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge */,
  "icu_admission" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the patient was admitted to the ICU */,
  "ventilator_use" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the patient required a ventilator */,
  "discharge_status" TEXT /* Status of the patient at discharge (e.g., recovered, transferred, deceased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser type) of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
